/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/serial-test.dir/unix_serial_tests.cc.o  -o /root/uwb_ws/devel/lib/serial/serial-test   -L/root/uwb_ws/build/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/root/uwb_ws/build/gtest:/root/uwb_ws/build/gtest/lib:/root/uwb_ws/devel/lib ../../../../gtest/lib/libgtest.so /root/uwb_ws/devel/lib/libserial.so -lutil -lpthread -lrt -lpthread
